title: StrategicReviewPacket
description: Evidence packet for the strategic-staleness review loop. Code assembles this from company_memory strategic claims (mission/strategy/priorities/projects) and cross-cutting operating decisions (operating-framework, tracker-boundaries, decision-claim handoffs) plus governance context. It is the input to the model-mediated strategic reviewer. Code owns structure and objective evidence (declared status, declared dates, age arithmetic, declared-window arithmetic); the model owns every semantic judgment (does this claim still hold, has it drifted, is it being acted on as if current).

review_week.description: ISO-8601 week the review belongs to, e.g. 2026-W26. Used to date the surfaced packet.

as_of.description: The instant strategic staleness was measured against. Age is computed from as_of minus the claim's declared last-validated instant.

findings.description: Objective strategic-claim findings. Each finding faithfully serializes a declared claim plus computed objective facts (age, declared-window exceeded). It carries no judgment about whether the claim has drifted; that is the reviewer's job.

constraints.description: Governance constraints the reviewer must honor, e.g. no auto-mutation without approval, model-mediated discipline.

allowed_outputs.description: The outputs the reviewer is permitted to return. Restricts the model's effect surface, not its judgment.

review_question.description: The model-mediated question the reviewer answers for each strategic claim.

scope_key.description: Stable per-claim identifier within the packet, e.g. 'company.sampleco|mission' or 'portfolio|operating-decision:forgeworks-positioning'.

subject_ref.description: The company_ref (e.g. company.sampleco) for company-level claims, or 'portfolio' for cross-cutting operating decisions.

claim_summary.description: Verbatim declared text of the claim (mission summary, strategy summary, a single current priority, a project summary, or an operating decision's title + declared status). Carried as evidence; code does not paraphrase or judge it.

declared_status.description: A status the source document itself declares for this claim (e.g. a project status of 'active', or an operating decision's 'Status: Draft' line). Empty string when the source declares no status. Objective evidence, not judgment.

last_validated_at.description: The instant the claim was last validated, as declared by its source (company_memory freshness.as_of, or an operating doc's Created/Updated line). Absent when the source declares no date.

declared_stale_after.description: The declared end of the claim's validity window (company_memory freshness.stale_after). Absent when the source declares no window.

validity_window_exceeded.description: True when as_of is at or beyond the claim's own declared validity-window end. Arithmetic on a field the source itself declares, not semantic judgment. False when no window is declared.

age_days.description: as_of minus last_validated_at, in whole days. Objective fact. Absent when last_validated_at is unknown.

source_doc_ref.description: Origin of the claim: a JSON doc path for company_memory, or a markdown path for operating decisions.
